def positive_upstream_call_without_timeout_in_handler():
    rule_id = "upstream_call_without_timeout_in_handler"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Request handlers issue upstream HTTP calls without visible timeout configuration."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
